name: Nebulizer
descs:
First Turn Start of an Encounter: all allies gain 4 [Breath] Potency and +4 [Breath] Count.

When activating Pride Absolute Resonance, all allies gain 2 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at Combat Start.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate

<style="upgradeHighlight">First Turn Start of a wave</style>: All allies gain <style="upgradeHighlight">5 [Breath] Potency</style> and +4 [Breath] Count.

When activating Pride Absolute Resonance, all allies gain <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Breath] Potency</style> and +2 [Breath] Count.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate

First Turn Start of a wave: all allies gain 5 [Breath] Potency and <style="upgradeHighlight">+5 [Breath] Count</style>.

When activating <style="upgradeHighlight">Pride Resonance</style>, all allies gain 3 [Breath] Potency and <style="upgradeHighlight">+3 [Breath] Count</style> at Combat Start.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate
